# Batch 2 Burndown

## Goal

Remove optional feature branches and simplify to the admin core flow.

## Ticket Checklist

## Exit Gate

- [ ] Baseline flow runs scan -> dry run -> report -> apply -> export
- [ ] No dead controls or missing bindings remain
- [ ] Workflow text matches executable order
- [ ] No references remain to removed feature paths
